artifacts.title: Good receipt from 2024-02-07
artifacts.excerpt:
@Duderichy since some are asking for a fact-check:
5k female murders, 34% by intimate partner -> 1.7k in total
18k male murders, 6% by intimate partner -> 1.1k in total

def a gap (~3:2 ratio), but much smaller than 34%:6% would have you believe.

source:
https://t.co/UasTX8zR1K

artifacts.title: Kinda receipt from 2024-12-06
artifacts.excerpt:
@Duderichy Kinda fake news.

It’s not a “new cash incentive”, pensions are always passed on tax-free if you die before 75.

It is:
a) accurate to say this interaction of older laws + legalizing euthanasia may create bad incentives
b) misleading to claim its an intentional incentive https://t.co/ia3NQrK0u3
